mapper.select: SELECT id, video_id, channel_id, promotion_copy, method, status, result_url, error_message, executed_at, created_at FROM promotion_record WHERE video_id = #{videoId} ORDER BY created_at DESC

SELECT pr.channel_id, pc.name AS channel_name, COUNT(*) AS total_count, SUM(CASE WHEN pr.status = 'COMPLETED' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS success_count FROM promotion_record pr JOIN promotion_channel pc ON pr.channel_id = pc.id WHERE pr.created_at BETWEEN #{startDate} AND #{endDate} GROUP BY pr.channel_id, pc.name ORDER BY total_count DESC

SELECT channel_id, COUNT(*) AS total_executions, SUM(CASE WHEN status = 'COMPLETED' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS success_count, SUM(CASE WHEN status = 'FAILED' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS failed_count FROM promotion_record WHERE created_at >= #{since} GROUP BY channel_id
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO promotion_record (id, video_id, channel_id, promotion_copy, method, status, result_url, error_message, executed_at, created_at) VALUES ( #{id, typeHandler=com.grace.platform.shared.infrastructure.persistence.typehandler.PromotionRecordIdTypeHandler}, #{videoId, typeHandler=com.grace.platform.shared.infrastructure.persistence.typehandler.VideoIdTypeHandler}, #{channelId, typeHandler=com.grace.platform.shared.infrastructure.persistence.typehandler.ChannelIdTypeHandler}, #{promotionCopy}, #{method, typeHandler=org.apache.ibatis.type.EnumTypeHandler}, #{status, typeHandler=org.apache.ibatis.type.EnumTypeHandler}, #{resultUrl}, #{errorMessage}, #{executedAt}, #{createdAt} )
mapper.update: UPDATE promotion_record SET video_id = #{videoId, typeHandler=com.grace.platform.shared.infrastructure.persistence.typehandler.VideoIdTypeHandler}, channel_id = #{channelId, typeHandler=com.grace.platform.shared.infrastructure.persistence.typehandler.ChannelIdTypeHandler}, promotion_copy = #{promotionCopy}, method = #{method, typeHandler=org.apache.ibatis.type.EnumTypeHandler}, status = #{status, typeHandler=org.apache.ibatis.type.EnumTypeHandler}, result_url = #{resultUrl}, error_message = #{errorMessage}, executed_at = #{executedAt} WHERE id = #{id, typeHandler=com.grace.platform.shared.infrastructure.persistence.typehandler.PromotionRecordIdTypeHandler}
